privileged_info_summary: This task involves refactoring a synthetic Java payment processing system using IntelliJ IDEA. The 'payment-platform' project is generated with three key classes: StripeService (concrete implementation), CheckoutService (dependent client), and PaymentGateway (interface to be extracted). StripeService contains three business methods (charge, refund, verifyCard) that return PaymentResult or boolean, and two private helper methods (connectToStripeAPI, logTransaction). The project compiles with Java 17 and uses Maven. The task requires extracting these business methods into a PaymentGateway interface that StripeService must implement, then refactoring CheckoutService to depend on the interface instead of the concrete class.
